{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Elderspawn of Urg’naut
| species = Elderspawn
| appears_in = Elder Empire
| introduced = [[Of Kings and Killers (novel)|Of Kings and Killers]]
}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|[[The Shade]] is an [[Elderspawn of Urg’naut]] that feeds on bloodlust and vengeance.<ref name="ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers-c18">''Of Kings and Killers'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Of Kings and Killers]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire characters]]
[[Category:Elders and Elderspawn]]
